_comment: BCOS schedule configuration. To change anything here, ask Claude: 'run audit twice a week', 'turn off architecture review', 'switch to weekdays-only index'. Claude will use the schedule-tune skill to edit this file safely. Manual editing works too but is not recommended.

dispatcher._comment: Informational only — the actual cron is on the scheduled task itself (bcos-{PROJECT}). If you change the cron, update this hint too so docs stay in sync.

index-health._about: Rebuild document index + scan for frontmatter, metadata, and cross-reference issues. Cheap — always run daily.

daydream-lessons._about: Strategic reflection + lessons capture. Once a week is usually enough.

daydream-deep._about: Deeper mid-week daydream — gaps, structural change. Skip in new projects where context is still forming.

audit-inbox._about: Deep CLEAR audit + inbox processing. Weekly by default; bump to twice-weekly if the inbox grows faster than you can triage.

architecture-review._about: Monthly full architecture + ecosystem pass. Quarterly is fine once context is mature — just change 'schedule' to a cron like '0 0 1 */3 *' or ask Claude to do it.

auto_fix._about: Fixes the dispatcher is allowed to apply without asking. Anything NOT on this list becomes an action item instead. See references/auto-fix-whitelist.md for exact semantics of each ID.

digest._about: Overwrites each run. Full history lives in .claude/hook_state/schedule-diary.jsonl

tuning._about: Adaptive tuning is suggestion-only. The dispatcher never changes this config on its own.
